things.name: Ashanti Cultural Centre & Museum
things.description: Ashanti Kingdom art, gold regalia and traditional crafts

things.name: Manhyia Palace Museum
things.description: Palace of the Asantehene - the Ashanti King - with royal throne and regalia

things.name: Kumasi Kejetia Market
things.description: West Africa's largest open market - 12,000 stalls with everything imaginable

things.name: Kumasi Fort & Military Museum
things.description: British fort housing the history of the Anglo-Ashanti Wars

things.name: Bonwire Kente Weaving Village
things.description: Village where Ghana's royal Kente cloth has been woven for 400 years

things.name: Lake Bosumtwi
things.description: Sacred crater lake where the Ashanti believe the souls of the dead go

things.name: Adanwomase Kente & Adinkra Villages
things.description: See Adinkra cloth printing using carved calabash stamps

things.name: National Cultural Centre Grounds
things.description: Craft workshops, pottery and weaving with the finest Ghanaian artisans

things.name: KNUST Botanical Garden
things.description: University botanical garden with forest trails and medicinal plants

things.name: Fufu with Light Soup
things.description: Kumasi's favourite - pounded yam and plantain fufu with spicy goat light soup
